sqlMap.select:
select count(*) from g_dangerousitem_t d left join sys_basic_msg_t bm on bm.id=d.goodscode where d.validflag>0
d.casename like '%$casename$%'
bm.basicName like '%$goodscode$%'

select d.*,bm.basicName as goodscodename from g_dangerousitem_t d left join sys_basic_msg_t bm on bm.id=d.goodscode where d.validflag>0
d.casename like '%$casename$%'
bm.basicName like '%$goodscode$%'
order by sjdate desc
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO g_dangerousitem_t (itemtype,goodscode,casename,codenum,sjdate,sjgov,sjmj,sjfs,sl,position,result,sjdx,dxsfz,attachments,validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo,personid) VALUES ('$itemtype$','$goodscode$','$casename$','$codenum$','$sjdate$','$sjgov$','$sjmj$','$sjfs$','$sl$','$position$','$result$','$sjdx$', '$dxsfz$','$attachments$',$validflag$,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$',$personid$) SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE g_dangerousitem_t SET validflag = 0,updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: select A.*,GROUP_CONCAT(sf.fileName order by sf.id) as filenames,GROUP_CONCAT(sf.id order by sf.id) as fileids,bm.basicName as goodscodename from(SELECT * FROM g_dangerousitem_t WHERE validflag > 0 AND id = $id$)A LEFT JOIN sys_file_t sf on FIND_IN_SET(sf.id,A.attachments) left join sys_basic_msg_t bm on bm.id=A.goodscode GROUP BY A.id
select count(*) from g_dangerousitem_t where addtime like CONCAT('%',DATE_FORMAT(now(),'%Y-%m-%d'),'%')
select count(*) from g_dangerousitem_t where validflag>0 and personid=$personid$ order by sjdate desc
select d.*,bm.basicName as goodscodename from g_dangerousitem_t d left join sys_basic_msg_t bm on bm.id=d.goodscode where d.validflag>0 and d.personid=$personid$ order by sjdate desc
